transcript: If you're looking for easy and delicious appetizers and desserts to impress your friends and family this holiday season, you must check out the PC Insiders Report Holiday Edition. Every year I host a gift wrapping party while enjoying all my PC ready to cook dishes. Here are my two favorites that you need to try. Savory jerk chicken wings, easy to prepare, and an ultimate crowd favorite. Next we got the PC crispy shrimp hors d'oeuvre trio, super crispy and flavorful, my personal favorite. Make sure to shop the PC Insiders Report Holiday Edition now!
